title: manihot dulcis var. multifida
intro: Manihot dulcis var. multifida, also known as the pitaaya or red dragon fruit vine, is a variety of the manihot dulcis plant that has become popular for its vibrant red-purple leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Manihot dulcis var. multifida is often combined with other plants to create remedies for skin conditions, respiratory issues, and other health concerns.
